completion_promises.criterion_text: Body under target size produces exactly 1 chunk
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented token counting logic that returns single chunk when body token count is below target_tokens. Test test_short_body_returns_single_chunk verifies this behavior.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Body just over target size produces 2 chunks with overlapping content between them
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _split_large_section function that splits text exceeding target_tokens into multiple chunks with configurable overlap. Tests test_body_just_over_target_returns_two_chunks and test_two_chunks_have_overlapping_content verify both chunk count and overlap behavior.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A multi-heading document splits at heading boundaries where possible; no heading is orphaned from its section
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _split_into_sections function using regex pattern r'^#{1,6}\s' to detect markdown headings and group content with its heading. The chunking logic preserves heading-section integrity by treating them as atomic units. Tests test_splits_at_heading_boundaries_when_possible and test_heading_never_orphaned_from_section verify heading-aware splitting.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Each chunk after the first begins with content overlapping the previous chunk
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented overlap logic using _extract_tail_tokens to extract overlap_tokens from end of previous chunk and prepend to next chunk. The _split_large_section function uses sliding window with (target - overlap) stride. Test test_each_chunk_after_first_has_overlap verifies all chunks except first contain overlapping content.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Empty body and whitespace-only body both return `[]`
completion_promises.evidence: Added guard clause at start of chunk_prose: 'if not body or not body.strip(): return []'. Tests test_empty_string_returns_empty_list, test_whitespace_only_returns_empty_list, and test_only_newlines_returns_empty_list verify empty list returned for all empty/whitespace inputs.

completion_promises.criterion_text: `Chunk.index` is monotonic from 0; `source_ref` and `project` propagate to every chunk
completion_promises.evidence: All Chunk objects created with 'index=len(chunks)' ensuring monotonic sequence from 0. Both source_ref and project parameters are propagated to every Chunk constructor call. Tests test_chunk_index_monotonic_from_zero, test_source_ref_propagates_to_all_chunks, test_project_propagates_to_all_chunks, and test_source_ref_none_propagates verify metadata propagation.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Function is pure: no I/O, deterministic for a given input
completion_promises.evidence: Implementation uses only pure functions: string operations (split, join, strip), regex matching, and arithmetic. No I/O operations, no external state, no random number generation. Tests test_deterministic_same_input_same_output and test_no_side_effects_input_unchanged verify purity and determinism.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'ruff check src/fleet_memory/relay/chunker.py' (passed) and 'ruff format src/fleet_memory/relay/chunker.py' (applied formatting). Both commands completed with zero errors.
